expectations.text: Correctly identifies that 'api' REST transport is missing from application transport list
expectations.evidence: States: 'api REST transport is defined but never referenced in any application transport list'

expectations.text: Provides corrected config with api added to application transport
expectations.evidence: Shows corrected YAML with - name: api added to transport list

expectations.text: Uses object format [{name: api}] in the fix
expectations.evidence: Fix shows '- name: api' object format, not string format
